description_long: This bungalow features a broad, brown gable roof with a gentle pitch, extending over a light beige exterior accented by white-framed windows. The structure is elevated on one side, supported by visible stilts or posts, suggesting adaptation to a sloped terrain. The front facade includes a covered entryway and a carport, with multiple windows providing natural light to the interior. The rear side reveals a walk-out lower level, with additional windows and a secondary entrance. The building sits on a rectangular plot with a concrete driveway and a raised platform. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A beige bungalow with a wide brown gable roof, white-framed windows, and a carport, elevated on one side to accommodate a sloped lot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long brown gable roof, beige siding, and the elevated platform with supporting posts.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the triangular gable, two rows of windows, and the visible support structure beneath the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple windows, a secondary entrance, and the walk-out lower level with supporting posts.
description_view_3: Opposite end view with symmetrical window arrangement and the elevated structure clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
